message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

box "host"
participant "MultiDisplayService" as host_mds
end box

box "rcv"
participant "IMultipleDisplaysUiController" as rcv_ctrl
participant "IMultipleDisplaysDelegate" as rcv_del
end box

box "controller"
participant "DisplaysSwapViewController" as ctrl_vc
participant "DisplaysSwapPresenter" as ctrl_pres
end box

host_mds -> host_mds : onDisplayAdded
host_mds -> rcv_ctrl : updateDisplayInfos
host_mds -> host_mds : onDisplayRemoved
host_mds -> rcv_ctrl : updateDisplayInfos

rcv_ctrl <-- ctrl_vc : swap()
ctrl_vc -> ctrl_pres : swap()
ctrl_pres -> ctrl_pres : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
ctrl_pres -> ctrl_pres : loadMonitorsIndicator()
host_mds <- ctrl_pres : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
host_mds -> host_mds : notifyMultiDisplayChanged(type: MultiDisplayChangeType,displayId: Int)

@enduml
```
